mapper.sql: id, name, companyId, stdDeliveryDay, enableStdDeliveryDay, enableInventory, fcost_code, fstDeliveryDay, fstTransTypeId, shipDeliveryDay, stdProductManuDay, nstdProductManuDay, fullName, TransCurrency, paymentDay, sort, updateTime, updator, isAutoSend, email, supplier_class, enable_shikomi_cal, specmark_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.supplier
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.supplier (id, name, companyId, stdDeliveryDay, enableStdDeliveryDay, enableInventory, fcost_code, fstDeliveryDay, fstTransTypeId, shipDeliveryDay, stdProductManuDay, nstdProductManuDay, fullName, TransCurrency, paymentDay, sort, updateTime, updator, isAutoSend, email, supplier_class, enable_shikomi_cal, specmark_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stddeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enablestddeliveryday,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enableinventory,jdbcType=BIT}, #{fcostCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{fstdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fsttranstypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{shipdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nstdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transcurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sort,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{isautosend,jdbcType=BIT}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enableShikomiCal,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specmarkFlag,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into dbo.supplier
id,
name,
companyId,
stdDeliveryDay,
enableStdDeliveryDay,
enableInventory,
fcost_code,
fstDeliveryDay,
fstTransTypeId,
shipDeliveryDay,
stdProductManuDay,
nstdProductManuDay,
fullName,
TransCurrency,
paymentDay,
sort,
updateTime,
updator,
isAutoSend,
email,
supplier_class,
enable_shikomi_cal,
specmark_flag,

mapper.update:
update dbo.supplier
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyId = #{record.companyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDeliveryDay = #{record.stddeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableStdDeliveryDay = #{record.enablestddeliveryday,jdbcType=BIT},
enableInventory = #{record.enableinventory,jdbcType=BIT},
fcost_code = #{record.fcostCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
fstDeliveryDay = #{record.fstdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fstTransTypeId = #{record.fsttranstypeid,jdbcType=CHAR},
shipDeliveryDay = #{record.shipdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdProductManuDay = #{record.stdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nstdProductManuDay = #{record.nstdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fullName = #{record.fullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TransCurrency = #{record.transcurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paymentDay = #{record.paymentday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
isAutoSend = #{record.isautosend,jdbcType=BIT},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_class = #{record.supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
enable_shikomi_cal = #{record.enableShikomiCal,jdbcType=BIT},
specmark_flag = #{record.specmarkFlag,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.supplier set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, companyId = #{record.companyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDeliveryDay = #{record.stddeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableStdDeliveryDay = #{record.enablestddeliveryday,jdbcType=BIT}, enableInventory = #{record.enableinventory,jdbcType=BIT}, fcost_code = #{record.fcostCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, fstDeliveryDay = #{record.fstdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fstTransTypeId = #{record.fsttranstypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, shipDeliveryDay = #{record.shipdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdProductManuDay = #{record.stdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nstdProductManuDay = #{record.nstdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fullName = #{record.fullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TransCurrency = #{record.transcurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paymentDay = #{record.paymentday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, isAutoSend = #{record.isautosend,jdbcType=BIT}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_class = #{record.supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enable_shikomi_cal = #{record.enableShikomiCal,jdbcType=BIT}, specmark_flag = #{record.specmarkFlag,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.supplier
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyId = #{companyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDeliveryDay = #{stddeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableStdDeliveryDay = #{enablestddeliveryday,jdbcType=BIT},
enableInventory = #{enableinventory,jdbcType=BIT},
fcost_code = #{fcostCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
fstDeliveryDay = #{fstdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fstTransTypeId = #{fsttranstypeid,jdbcType=CHAR},
shipDeliveryDay = #{shipdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdProductManuDay = #{stdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nstdProductManuDay = #{nstdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fullName = #{fullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TransCurrency = #{transcurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paymentDay = #{paymentday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
isAutoSend = #{isautosend,jdbcType=BIT},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_class = #{supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
enable_shikomi_cal = #{enableShikomiCal,jdbcType=BIT},
specmark_flag = #{specmarkFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.supplier set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, companyId = #{companyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDeliveryDay = #{stddeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableStdDeliveryDay = #{enablestddeliveryday,jdbcType=BIT}, enableInventory = #{enableinventory,jdbcType=BIT}, fcost_code = #{fcostCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, fstDeliveryDay = #{fstdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fstTransTypeId = #{fsttranstypeid,jdbcType=CHAR}, shipDeliveryDay = #{shipdeliveryday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdProductManuDay = #{stdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nstdProductManuDay = #{nstdproductmanuday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fullName = #{fullname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TransCurrency = #{transcurrency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paymentDay = #{paymentday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, isAutoSend = #{isautosend,jdbcType=BIT}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_class = #{supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enable_shikomi_cal = #{enableShikomiCal,jdbcType=BIT}, specmark_flag = #{specmarkFlag,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
